{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Iron Striker
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|An [[Iron Striker]] is a person wearing an iron badge etched with an arrow.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
